title: Social Media Post for Event Promotion
scenario: Create a social media post to promote an upcoming music festival. The post should include the festival name, date, time, location, and a brief description of the event. The post should include a call-to-action to purchase tickets and a link to the ticket website. The post should be under 120 characters and include a relevant hashtag.
constraints: Must include a call-to-action to purchase tickets and a link to the ticket website

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the post meets the character count and call-to-action requirements.
Evaluate if the post is clear and easy to understand.
Check for any grammar or spelling errors.
Evaluate if the post is relevant to the festival and the target audience.
